notes: Holt-Lunstad et al. 2010 (PLoS Medicine); 148 prospective studies; OR=1.50 (50% increased survival odds with stronger social ties); effect comparable to smoking cessation
Holt-Lunstad et al. 2015 (Perspectives on Psychological Science); loneliness and social isolation both independently predict early mortality; foundational landmark paper
2025 comprehensive meta-analysis in older adults; social isolation +35% all-cause mortality, living alone +21%, loneliness +14%
